structural_claim: Symmetry breaking mechanisms fundamentally determine the observable properties and mass scales of physical systems

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Spontaneous symmetry breaking of electroweak symmetry generates mass for fundamental particles

supporting_results.result_name: Discovery of the W and Z bosons
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Gauge symmetry breaking creates massive force carriers from massless gauge fields
Spontaneous breaking of gauge symmetry leads to macroscopic quantum coherence and new collective states
External fields break rotational symmetry, lifting degeneracies and creating new energy scales
